description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:53-67. Only emptiness and a single '/' check on name. K8s namespace and secret name must conform to DNS-1123 subdomain (lowercase alphanumeric, '-', '.', max 253 chars, no leading/trailing dash). Invalid inputs reach the apiserver and surface as Backend errors with opaque server messages. Filing as Task (not Bug) because the server does enforce this; the maintainer burden is repeated 'why does this fail at runtime instead of at parse time' user reports. Fix: validate against the DNS-1123 rules at from_uri time, return InvalidUri with a precise message.
title: Namespace and secret-name not validated as DNS-1123 subdomain
